prompt: Write test cases for a password reset feature. It's a web app. The flow is: user clicks 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enters their email, gets a reset link by email (valid for 60 minutes), clicks the link, sets a new password (min 8 chars, must include a number), and is redirected to the login page. Old password should stop working immediately after reset.
assertions: The output includes a Test Strategy section with scope, testing types table, and risk assessment
The output includes a Test Plan section with test environment, test phases, and defect severity levels
Test scenarios are grouped into at least 3 feature areas (e.g. trigger flow, reset link, password validation)
At least one test case covers the 60-minute link expiry boundary condition
At least one test case verifies the old password is invalidated after reset
At least one negative test case covers an unregistered email being submitted
Test case steps are concrete and specific (not vague like 'navigate to the feature')
Pass Criteria and Fail Criteria are present and binary for each detailed test case
A Coverage Validation Report maps requirements to test case/scenario IDs
